$comment: World of SMGP voice pack - the SEGA-universe newsroom brightened. Every template is era-restricted to 'smgp' (arcade-caps exuberance: the big board, the D.P. board, the LEVEL A-D ladder, the Preliminary Race, the circus). In-world colour only - generic sponsor/paddock flavour, no new canon names. New pools: swBoard (big-board lines), swCrowd (crowd/atmosphere), swLadder (ladder chatter); smgp era variants appended to shared champChatter/paddockBuzz/wrenchNote. Ids are stable rendezvous keys - never rename.

smgp: THE BIG BOARD FLASHES THE NAME IN LETTERS TEN FEET TALL.
Up on the big board the numbers shuffle, settle, and start meaning things.
Down in the square the big board flickers, and the whole town reads it at once.
The big board holds the score long after the engines cool.
INSERT NOTHING - THE BIG BOARD ALREADY KNOWS.
The record board keeps its own counsel; the big board shouts.
default: The results board settles the argument.
The numbers are up for everyone to read.

smgp: The grandstand is a wall of noise from first corner to last.
Somewhere over the hairpin, the tannoy gives up competing with the crowd.
Flags of every colour on the calendar wave over the fences.
The crowd spills down to the fences and stays until the floodlights go out.
The grandstand does not sit down all afternoon.
Programme sellers give up entirely; nobody is reading tonight.
default: The fences were lined three deep.

smgp: On the ladder, every result is a rung - up or down, never sideways.
The LEVEL boards get a fresh coat of chalk tonight.
Somewhere between the LEVEL D floor and the summit, a challenge list just got rewritten.
The seat-swap whispers start before the champagne dries.
Challenge lists come out of jacket pockets all down the pit lane.
From the LEVEL D floor to the crown seat, the whole ladder felt that one.
default: The order of things shifted a little today.

smgp: THE D.P. BOARD DOES THE TALKING NOW.
Every garage on the ladder is counting D.P. on its fingers tonight.
The title arithmetic scrolls across the big board all evening.
The transporters buzz like a struck hive tonight.
Half the paddock talks; the other half updates its challenge list.
The circus will chew on this one all the way to the next circuit.
The all-night lamps burn over one garage tonight.
Torque wrenches click like crickets down the pit lane after dark.
The parts trucks will be unloaded twice before the next flag.

templates.headline: {subject} WINS[[?venue: AT {venue}]] AND THE BIG BOARD SINGS
templates.deck: Victory[[?round: in round {round}]] of the {year} World Championship, {team} colours over the flag
templates.summary: {subject} took the flag first[[?venue: at {venue}]][[?round: in round {round}]], and the whole circus knew it.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} {subject} WINS! The {team} machine ran the sharp end like it was rented for the day[[?venue: , and {venue} belonged to one car from lights to flag]]. {pool:swCrowd}
sections.impact: {pool:swBoard} [[?champPosition: The D.P. column ticks over, and the championship account now reads {ord:champPosition}.]] {pool:swLadder}

templates.headline: RAIN MASTER: {subject} TAMES THE STORM[[?venue: AT {venue}]]
templates.deck: A wet-weather win[[?round: in round {round}]] while half the ladder swam
templates.summary: {subject} won in the rain[[?venue: at {venue}]], the field left paddling in the spray.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} The sky opened, the ladder flipped, and {subject} simply VANISHED up the road. Wet days are honest days in this world - horsepower counts for less, nerve for everything - and the {team} car danced where the rest aquaplaned.
sections.context: The old hands say rain is the great leveller of the LEVEL boards: it cannot read a budget and it holds no favourites. Today it picked its driver all the same. {pool:swCrowd}

templates.headline: OPENING FLAG TO {subject}! THE SEASON STARTS AT THE SUMMIT
templates.deck: First blood in the {year} World Championship[[?venue: at {venue}]]
templates.summary: {subject} won the season opener[[?venue: at {venue}]] - and rules the big board for a fortnight.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} They say win the opening flag and your name rules the big board for a fortnight - worth more than the raw D.P. in pure swagger. {subject} collected both[[?venue: at {venue}]]: first flag of the campaign, first name at the summit.
sections.next: The calendar stretches long from here, and this circus keeps a cruel memory. But every ladder is climbed a rung at a time, and the first one is already behind the {team} garage.

templates.headline: LAST FLAG OF THE YEAR, AND {subject} TAKES IT
templates.deck: The {year} season signs off with {team} colours out front
templates.summary: {subject} won the final round[[?venue: at {venue}]] - the year's last word, said loudest.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} The final flag of the season falls, and it falls on the {team} car first. {subject} closes the campaign the way every driver on the ladder dreams about: with the year's last picture showing one machine clear of the pack[[?venue: at {venue}]].
sections.championship: [[?champPosition: The final D.P. board files {subject} away at {ord:champPosition} for the winter.]] {pool:champChatter}
sections.close: The transporters roll home with a win strapped on top of the load. {pool:swCrowd}

templates.headline: GAME, SET, CROWN: {subject} WINS AND TAKES THE TITLE
templates.deck: The {year} World Championship is decided at full throttle
templates.summary: {subject} sealed the {year} crown with victory[[?venue: at {venue}]].

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} There are two ways to take a crown in this world: on a slide rule, or at full throttle with the flag falling first. {subject} chose the loud way[[?venue: at {venue}]], and the {year} World Championship is OVER.
sections.championship: {pool:swBoard} [[?gap: The final margin reads {gap} D.P., and the mathematics have stopped arguing.]] The record board takes a new name tonight, and record boards never give one back.

templates.headline: {subject} CLIMBS THE ROSTRUM[[?venue: AT {venue}]]
templates.deck: Champagne[[?position: for {ord:position}]][[?round: in round {round}]] of the World Championship
templates.summary: {subject} finished on the podium[[?position: in {ord:position}]][[?venue: at {venue}]].

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} Champagne over the {team} garage! {subject} carried the car onto the rostrum[[?position: , {ord:position} at the flag,]] and the podium clock ticked off one more name for its collection.
sections.context: [[?expected: The form guide had pencilled in {ord:expected}, which only makes the silverware taste sweeter.]] Podiums are the hard currency of the climb in this world - the LEVEL boards do not count near-misses. {pool:swLadder}

templates.headline: WHEEL TO WHEEL: {subject} TAKES A PODIUM OUT OF THE DUEL
templates.deck: The rostrum settles an argument[[?round: in round {round}]]
templates.summary: {subject} claimed a podium[[?rival: with {rival} filling the mirrors the whole way]].

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} This one was PERSONAL. {subject} banked a rostrum finish[[?venue: at {venue}]][[?position: , {ord:position} at the flag]], and every lap of it was fought at arm's length[[?rival: with {rival} in the mirrors]].
sections.rivalry: [[?rival: The ladder keeps score of duels the way a bookmaker keeps a ledger: {rival} will want this one back, and both challenge lists know it.]] The grandstand got the show it queued for. {pool:swCrowd}

templates.headline: SMOKE ON THE STRAIGHT: THE MACHINE QUITS ON {subject}
templates.deck: A mechanical retirement[[?round: in round {round}]][[?venue: at {venue}]]
templates.summary: {subject} retired[[?venue: at {venue}]] when the {team} machine gave out underneath a good drive.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} The cruellest sound in this world is not the crash - it is the COUGH. The {team} machine cried enough underneath {subject}[[?venue: at {venue}]], and a day's honest work rolled to a stop on the grass.
sections.reliability: {pool:wrenchNote} Somewhere in a hospitality box a title sponsor studies the telemetry with a long face; machinery is the one rung of the ladder money is supposed to guarantee.

templates.headline: THE HAIRPIN BITES: {subject} PUTS IT IN THE BARRIERS
templates.deck: Driver error ends the day[[?round: in round {round}]]
templates.summary: {subject} crashed out[[?venue: at {venue}]] - and the only culprit was in the cockpit.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} Every circuit on this calendar keeps a trophy cabinet of broken pride, and today it collected from {subject}. One corner asked for more than the {team} car had grip to give, and the barriers did the paperwork.
sections.context: The arcade truth of this world: the wall pays no D.P. and hands out no continues. The drive home is long, and the debrief will be longer. {pool:swBoard}

templates.headline: {subject} OWNS THE PRELIMINARY: POLE POSITION
templates.deck: Fastest of all when the clock ran alone[[?venue: at {venue}]]
templates.summary: {subject} put the {team} car on pole[[?round: for round {round}]].

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} One lap, one chance, the whole circuit to yourself - the Preliminary Race is this world's purest test, and {subject} aced it. The {team} machine starts from the very front[[?venue: at {venue}]], nothing ahead but clean road and the flag.
sections.next: Track position is gold on this calendar, and pole is the mint. Sunday will ask what {subject} intends to spend it on. {pool:swLadder}

templates.headline: THE RUN ROLLS ON: {subject} WINS AGAIN[[?streak: - {streak} STRAIGHT]]
templates.deck: Back-to-back and counting for the {team} garage
templates.summary: {subject} kept the winning run alive[[?venue: at {venue}]][[?streak: - {streak} in a row now]].

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} AGAIN! {subject} takes another flag[[?venue: at {venue}]][[?streak: , number {streak} in an unbroken line,]] and the rest of the ladder is quietly checking the rulebook for a way out.
sections.stats: {pool:swBoard} Streaks bend this whole world around them: challenge lists get redrawn, seat-swap whispers change key, and the D.P. column compounds like interest.

templates.headline: CAN ANYBODY STOP {subject}?[[?streak: {streak} STRAIGHT AND COUNTING]]
templates.deck: A winning run headed for the record board
templates.summary: {subject} stretched one of the great winning runs[[?streak: to {streak}]].

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} There is a point where a streak stops being form and becomes WEATHER - something the rest of the grid has to plan around. {subject} passed that point some flags ago[[?streak: ; the board now reads {streak} wins without an answer]].
sections.impact: The paddock has seen benchmarks before, and it knows the shape of an era when one starts. {pool:swLadder} {pool:paddockBuzz}

templates.headline: {subject} TAKES THE TOP OF THE D.P. BOARD
templates.deck: A new name at the summit[[?round: after round {round}]]
templates.summary: {subject} leads the World Championship, and the whole ladder tilts to look.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} The top line of the big board changes hands! {subject} climbs to the summit of the D.P. board[[?round: after round {round}]], and every garage below cranes its neck at a new silhouette up top.
sections.championship: {pool:champChatter} [[?gap: The cushion reads {gap} D.P. - a ledge, not a fortress.]] Leading in this world paints a number on your engine cover, and every challenge list on the ladder just circled it.

templates.headline: THE SUMMIT SLIPS: {subject} LOSES THE CHAMPIONSHIP LEAD
templates.deck: The D.P. board turns over[[?round: after round {round}]]
templates.summary: {subject} dropped off the top of the standings[[?rival: as {rival} climbed past]].

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} The big board giveth, and the big board taketh away. {subject} wakes tomorrow one line lower[[?rival: , {rival} now wearing the top of the D.P. board,]] and the view from second is mostly gearbox.
sections.championship: {pool:champChatter} Nobody rents the summit in this world; you hold it flag by flag, or you hand it over.

templates.headline: CROWNED EARLY: {subject} SEALS THE {year} TITLE WITH FLAGS TO SPARE
templates.deck: The mathematics surrender before the calendar does
templates.summary: {subject} clinched the {year} World Championship with rounds still to run.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} The season is not finished, but the argument is. {subject} has the {year} crown locked away with flags still on the calendar[[?gap: , the gap of {gap} D.P. beyond any right foot on the grid]].
sections.championship: {pool:swBoard} The remaining rounds are exhibition nights now - the floodlit kind the sponsor boxes love best - but the record board has already gone to print.

templates.headline: {subject}: WORLD CHAMPION OF {year}
templates.deck: The record board takes a new name
templates.summary: {subject} is the {year} World Champion - struck into the record board for good.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} Strike it into the record board: {subject}, WORLD CHAMPION, {year}. A whole campaign of preliminaries, hairpins and knife-fight Sundays, and when the noise finally died there was one name left standing at the summit.
sections.championship: {pool:champChatter} The crown seat is the one rung of the ladder nobody can challenge for - it has to be taken the long way, flag by flag, exactly the way it was taken this year.

templates.headline: PRESS START: THE {year} WORLD CHAMPIONSHIP BEGINS
templates.deck: Season {season} of the long climb - {player} suits up with {team}
templates.summary: The {year} season begins with {player} in {team} colours and every D.P. column at zero.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} PRESS START. The transporters roll out, the LEVEL boards are chalked fresh, and every D.P. column on the big board reads zero - the one morning a year the whole ladder stands equal. For {player} and {team}, the climb starts now.
sections.next: The first Preliminary Race will sort the brave from the merely loud soon enough. {pool:swLadder}

templates.headline: GAME OVER FOR {year} - AND WHAT A GAME IT WAS
templates.deck: Season {season} enters the record board
templates.summary: The {year} season is complete; the columns are frozen where they stand.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} The big board runs its final scroll of {year} and goes dark. The circus breaks camp, the floodlights come down, and a season's worth of noise settles into columns of D.P. that will never move again.
sections.context: {pool:swBoard} Winter in this world is not rest - it is the quiet trading floor where seats change hands and challenge lists get drafted by lamplight.
sections.close: The flag drops anew in spring. It always does.

templates.headline: A NEW CHALLENGER ENTERS: {player} JOINS THE WORLD CHAMPIONSHIP
templates.deck: An empty line on the big board gets a name - destination {team}
templates.summary: {player} begins the climb with {team}, from the bottom rung with the summit in view.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} A NEW CHALLENGER ENTERS THE CIRCUS! The entry list grows by one name nobody on the ladder recognises - yet. {player} arrives in {team} colours with zero D.P., zero scalps, and a challenge list still smelling of fresh ink.
sections.next: This world keeps a simple ledger: beat the driver above you, or make peace with the view. The first Preliminary Race will open the audit. {pool:swLadder}

templates.headline: INJURY IN THE CIRCUS: {subject} HURT[[?missRaces: - OUT {missRaces} ROUNDS]]
templates.deck: Medical bulletin from the paddock
templates.summary: {subject} was injured in an accident[[?missRaces: and will miss the next {missRaces} rounds]].

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} The tannoy goes quiet mid-sentence, and the paddock learns the news the slow way: {subject} is hurt[[?venue: after an accident at {venue}]][[?missRaces: , ruled out for the next {missRaces} rounds]]. The {team} garage packs the car away without a word.
sections.context: Even this bright, loud world has its cold corners. The ladder pauses for nobody, but tonight the crowd files out softer than it came in.
sections.close: Machines keep deadlines. Healing keeps its own.

templates.headline: {subject} WATCHES ONE GO BY[[?round: - ROUND {round} FROM THE WALL]]
templates.deck: The recovery clock outranks the racing one
templates.summary: {subject} sat out[[?round: round {round}]] through injury, the climb on hold.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} The hardest seat in the circus has no belts: {subject} spent the day on the pit wall[[?round: while round {round} ran without the name on the entry list]], watching somebody else keep the cockpit warm.
sections.context: In a world built on ladders, standing still feels like falling. The old hands know better: rounds missed heal over, and comebacks are this circus's favourite story. {pool:swCrowd}

templates.headline: THE GRID HAS A PROBLEM, AND ITS NAME IS {subject}
templates.deck: The winning run the whole ladder is chasing
templates.summary: {subject} keeps on winning[[?streak: - {streak} in a row now]], and nobody has an answer.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} Somewhere down the pit lane a rival snaps another pencil: {subject} has won AGAIN[[?venue: , this time at {venue}]][[?streak: - win number {streak} in an unbroken run]][[?winnerTeam: , and the {winnerTeam} garage has stopped pretending to be surprised]].
sections.impact: This is how benchmarks get made in this world: not announced, ACCUMULATED. Every flag lays another brick, and the rest of the grid chooses between chasing and watching. {pool:swLadder}

templates.headline: A REIGN IN FULL SWING: {subject} WILL NOT STOP WINNING
templates.deck: The ladder measures itself against one machine now
templates.summary: {subject} stretched a monstrous winning run[[?streak: to {streak}]], and the grid can only witness it.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} Stop calling it a streak.[[?streak: {streak} straight flags is not form - it is GEOGRAPHY, a mountain the calendar has to route around.]] {subject} owns the sharp end of this World Championship until further notice.
sections.context: The grandstand has settled into its role: witnesses. {pool:swCrowd} Every age of this world gets its untouchable - the name the LEVEL boards bend toward - and the current one is writing itself in capital letters.

templates.headline: THE LADDER FLIPS: {subject} WINS FROM NOWHERE
templates.deck: An upset for the ages[[?winnerTeam: - {winnerTeam} on the top step]]
templates.summary: {subject} took a shock win[[?winnerTeam: for {winnerTeam}]], and the form book went in the bin.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} READ THE BOARD TWICE - it is not a misprint. {subject} took the flag[[?venue: at {venue}]][[?winnerTeam: , {winnerTeam} colours on the top step,]] and the LEVEL boards spun like slot reels.
sections.impact: This is what keeps the grandstands full in this world: the rule that says money and horsepower decide everything, and the days that tear the rule up. {pool:swCrowd}

templates.headline: GIANT DOWN! {subject} PULLS OFF THE SHOCK OF THE SEASON
templates.deck: The aristocracy of the grid gets ambushed[[?venue: at {venue}]]
templates.summary: {subject} scored one of the great upset wins[[?winnerTeam: for {winnerTeam}]].

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} Once a season, if the circus is lucky, a race happens that nobody bought a ticket for: {subject} beat the whole aristocracy of the grid[[?expected: from a card marked {ord:expected}]][[?winnerTeam: and hauled {winnerTeam} onto a top step it had no appointment with]].
sections.impact: Up at the sharp end the grandees will file it as a freak result. Down the pit lane they know better: the ladder just proved it can be climbed at ANY speed. {pool:swLadder}

templates.headline: PERFECT GAME: {subject} LEADS EVERY LAP THAT MATTERED
templates.deck: Pole, flag, and everything in between[[?venue: at {venue}]]
templates.summary: {subject} dominated[[?round: round {round}]] from the very front, start to finish.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} Fastest in the Preliminary, first off the line, first at the flag - the kind of afternoon this world stamps PERFECT and the rest of the grid remembers as a long drive in someone else's shadow. {subject} left no crumbs[[?venue: at {venue}]].
sections.stats: {pool:swBoard} The timing screens tell a flat, brutal story: one car at the top of every sheet that matters, and a pack racing hard for the honour of second.

templates.headline: REMEMBER THE DATE: {player's} FIRST WIN GOES UP IN LIGHTS
templates.deck: A maiden victory[[?round: in round {round}]] of {year}
templates.summary: A first career win for {subject}[[?venue: at {venue}]] - the day a name became a result.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} Every big board in this world keeps one line free for a day like this. {subject} took a FIRST career victory[[?venue: at {venue}]], and somewhere between the flag and the podium the name stopped being a rumour and became a RESULT.
sections.impact: The {team} garage will not be sweeping up tonight; confetti earns a stay of execution. First wins move ladders: rivals reread their challenge lists, and the seats above suddenly check their mirrors. {pool:swLadder}
sections.next: The question the circus asks over the champagne is the only one worth asking: first of one, or first of MANY?
